label: April 24 — Undermined canonical clear under scripted Loamspike pressure
description: Canonical April 24 challenge-clear line. The board scripts 5 Loamspike Burrowers across waves 2–4; this fixture clears the run through all of them. Opens with a corner Sunroot Bloom at (0, 0) for sap economy, saturates lanes 1–3 (the loamspike lanes) with Thorn Vines at col 0/1 to apply approach pressure, and reaches the 3-defender glass-ram threshold in lanes 0 and 2 by the time wave-2 (t=27.5s) and wave-4 (t=79s) Glass Rams arrive. A rear Cottonburr Mortar at (2, 3) is placed at 01:12 (t=72000) as the scripted counterplay for wave 4's stacked burrower pressure. This fixture proves clearability of the Undermined challenge under Loamspike pressure — it is NOT an A/B load-bearing test (i.e. it does not prove Loamspike is the difference between clear and no-clear vs. a stripped roster); that comparison is left to a future AC-9 beam-search validator enhancement. coordinateBase stays 0 because the runtime replay harness consumes internal board coordinates.
